mapper.select: select am.id as modelId, am.model_code as modelCode, am.name as modelName, count(pa.id) as aircraftCount from t1_ac_model am left join t1_physical_aircraft pa on pa.model_id = am.id group by am.id, am.model_code, am.name order by am.model_code

select pa.id as aircraftId, pa.tail_number as tailNumber, pa.msn, pa.registration_number as registrationNumber, pa.aircraft_type as aircraftType, pa.variant, pa.engine_type as engineType, pa.manufacturer, pa.delivery_date as deliveryDate, pa.operational_status as operationalStatus, pa.total_fh as totalFh, pa.total_fc as totalFc, pa.current_operator as currentOperator, am.id as modelId, am.model_code as modelCode, am.name as modelName from t1_physical_aircraft pa left join t1_ac_model am on am.id = pa.model_id where pa.id = #{aircraftId}

select id as templateId, template_code as templateCode, template_version as templateVersion, name as templateName, description, template_type as templateType, applicable_object_type as applicableObjectType, status, is_default as isDefault from t1_dossier_template where status = 'active' and applicable_object_type = 'aircraft' order by is_default desc, updated_at desc, created_at desc limit 1

select id as templateId, template_code as templateCode, template_version as templateVersion, name as templateName, description, template_type as templateType, applicable_object_type as applicableObjectType, status, is_default as isDefault from t1_dossier_template where status in ('active', 'draft') and applicable_object_type = 'aircraft' order by case when status = 'active' then 0 else 1 end, is_default desc, updated_at desc, created_at desc

select id as templateId, template_code as templateCode, template_version as templateVersion, name as templateName, description, template_type as templateType, applicable_object_type as applicableObjectType, status, is_default as isDefault from t1_dossier_template where id = #{templateId} limit 1

select (select count(1) from t1_dossier_template_chapter where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1 and node_kind = 'chapter') as chapterCount, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_template_data_source where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1) as sourceCount, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_template_rule where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_template_param where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1) as paramCount

select id as chapterId, parent_id as parentId, chapter_code as chapterCode, chapter_name as chapterName, chapter_level as chapterLevel, chapter_path as chapterPath, node_kind as nodeKind, sort_order as sortOrder, required_flag as requiredFlag, completeness_requirement as completenessRequirement, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrsJson from t1_dossier_template_chapter where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1 order by sort_order, chapter_code

select ds.id as sourceId, ds.chapter_id as chapterId, ch.chapter_name as chapterName, ch.parent_id as parentId, ch.chapter_code as chapterCode, ch.chapter_level as chapterLevel, ch.chapter_path as chapterPath, ds.source_code as sourceCode, ds.source_system as sourceSystem, ds.source_table as sourceTable, ds.source_name as sourceName, ds.source_record_type as sourceRecordType, cast(ds.join_condition_json as char) as joinConditionJson, cast(ds.filter_condition_json as char) as filterConditionJson, ds.lifecycle_stage as lifecycleStage, ds.apply_object_type as applyObjectType, ds.supply_mode_scope as supplyModeScope, ds.key_part_scope as keyPartScope, ds.required_flag as requiredFlag, ds.sort_order as sortOrder, cast(ds.attrs_json as char) as attrsJson from t1_dossier_template_data_source ds left join t1_dossier_template_chapter ch on ch.id = ds.chapter_id where ds.template_id = #{templateId} and ds.enabled_flag = 1 order by ch.sort_order, ds.sort_order

select r.id as ruleId, r.chapter_id as chapterId, ch.chapter_name as chapterName, r.rule_code as ruleCode, r.rule_name as ruleName, r.rule_type as ruleType, r.target_table as targetTable, r.target_field as targetField, r.target_path as targetPath, r.rule_expression as ruleExpression, cast(r.rule_expression_json as char) as ruleExpressionJson, r.severity, r.error_message as errorMessage, r.remediation_hint as remediationHint, r.apply_object_type as applyObjectType, r.supply_mode_scope as supplyModeScope, r.key_part_scope as keyPartScope, r.required_flag as requiredFlag, r.sort_order as sortOrder from t1_dossier_template_rule r left join t1_dossier_template_chapter ch on ch.id = r.chapter_id where r.template_id = #{templateId} and r.enabled_flag = 1 order by r.sort_order, r.rule_code

select param_code as paramCode, param_name as paramName, param_type as paramType, param_value as paramValue, default_value as defaultValue, editable_flag as editableFlag, sort_order as sortOrder from t1_dossier_template_param where template_id = #{templateId} and enabled_flag = 1 order by sort_order, param_code
select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_schema = database() and table_name = #{tableName} order by ordinal_position

select id as nodeId, parent_id as parentId, node_level as nodeLevel, node_type as nodeType, part_number as partNumber, part_name as partName, serial_number as serialNumber, position_code as positionCode, ata_chapter as ataChapter, manufacturer, install_date as installDate, tsn_fh as tsnFh, tsn_fc as tsnFc, part_instance_id as partInstanceId from t1_aircraft_bom_node where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and is_active = 1 order by node_level, parent_id, position_code, part_number

select (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as lifecycleCount, (select max(updated_at) from t1_object_lifecycle_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as lifecycleMaxUpdatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_object_technical_status where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as technicalStatusCount, (select max(updated_at) from t1_object_technical_status where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as technicalStatusMaxUpdatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_object_status_history where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as statusHistoryCount, (select max(created_at) from t1_object_status_history where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as statusHistoryMaxCreatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_object_interface where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as interfaceCount, (select max(updated_at) from t1_object_interface where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as interfaceMaxUpdatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_life_usage_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as usageCount, (select max(created_at) from t1_life_usage_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as usageMaxCreatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_work_order where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as workOrderCount, (select max(created_at) from t1_work_order where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as workOrderMaxCreatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_fault_event where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as faultCount, (select max(updated_at) from t1_fault_event where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as faultMaxUpdatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_event_flight_leg where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as flightLegCount, (select max(created_at) from t1_event_flight_leg where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as flightLegMaxCreatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_inspection_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as inspectionRecordCount, (select max(created_at) from t1_inspection_record where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as inspectionRecordMaxCreatedAt, (select count(1) from t1_inspection_measurement where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId}) as inspectionMeasurementCount, ( select count(1) from t1_file_relation fr inner join ( select distinct part_number from t1_aircraft_bom_node where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and is_active = 1 ) pn on pn.part_number = fr.part_number where fr.relation_status != 'deleted' and fr.relation_type in ('PART_DOCUMENT','TECHNICAL_FILE','DRAWING','MODEL','ATTACHMENT','DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT') and ( fr.dossier_version_id is null or ( fr.source_record_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t1_file_relation source_fr where source_fr.id = fr.source_record_id ) ) ) ) as partDocumentCount, ( select max(fr.created_at) from t1_file_relation fr inner join ( select distinct part_number from t1_aircraft_bom_node where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and is_active = 1 ) pn on pn.part_number = fr.part_number where fr.relation_status != 'deleted' and fr.relation_type in ('PART_DOCUMENT','TECHNICAL_FILE','DRAWING','MODEL','ATTACHMENT','DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT') and ( fr.dossier_version_id is null or ( fr.source_record_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t1_file_relation source_fr where source_fr.id = fr.source_record_id ) ) ) ) as partDocumentMaxCreatedAt

with recursive subtree as ( select id, part_number from t1_aircraft_bom_node where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and id = #{nodeId} and is_active = 1 union all select c.id, c.part_number from t1_aircraft_bom_node c inner join subtree p on p.id = c.parent_id where c.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and c.is_active = 1 ) select (select count(1) from subtree) as subtreeNodeCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as lifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'design' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as designLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'manufacturing' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as manufacturingLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'inspection' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as inspectionLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'installation' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as installationLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'service' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as serviceLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'fault' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as faultLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.lifecycle_stage = 'technical_status' and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as technicalLifecycleCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_technical_status ts where ts.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and ts.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as technicalStatusCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_status_history sh where sh.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and sh.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as statusHistoryCount, (select count(1) from t1_object_interface oi where oi.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and (oi.source_bom_node_id in (select id from subtree) or oi.target_bom_node_id in (select id from subtree))) as interfaceCount, (select count(1) from t1_life_usage_record lu where lu.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lu.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as usageCount, (select count(1) from t1_work_order wo where wo.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and wo.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as workOrderCount, (select count(1) from t1_fault_event fe where fe.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and fe.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree)) as faultCount, (select count(1) from t1_file_relation fr where fr.part_number in (select part_number from subtree where part_number is not null) and fr.relation_status != 'deleted' and fr.relation_type in ('PART_DOCUMENT','TECHNICAL_FILE','DRAWING','MODEL','ATTACHMENT','DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT') and ( fr.dossier_version_id is null or ( fr.source_record_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t1_file_relation source_fr where source_fr.id = fr.source_record_id ) ) )) as partDocumentCount, (select lr.event_title from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree) order by lr.event_time desc, lr.created_at desc limit 1) as latestLifecycleTitle, (select date_format(lr.event_time, '%Y-%m-%d') from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.bom_node_id in (select id from subtree) order by lr.event_time desc, lr.created_at desc limit 1) as latestLifecycleDate

select * from ( select lr.source_system as sourceSystem, lr.source_table as sourceTable, lr.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(lr.business_record_key, lr.source_record_id, lr.id) as sourceRecordKey, lr.business_record_type as itemType, upper(lr.lifecycle_stage) as lifecycleStage, coalesce(lr.event_title, lr.business_record_type) as itemName, lr.event_summary as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(lr.source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'eventTime', lr.event_time, 'resultStatus', lr.result_status, 'businessRecordType', lr.business_record_type, 'businessRecordKey', lr.business_record_key ) as char) as attrsJson, lr.event_time as eventTime, 10 as sortGroup from t1_object_lifecycle_record lr where lr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lr.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select coalesce(ts.source_system, 'PLM') as sourceSystem, coalesce(ts.source_table, 't1_object_technical_status') as sourceTable, ts.id as sourceRecordId, ts.status_code as sourceRecordKey, 'technical_status' as itemType, 'TECHNICAL_STATUS' as lifecycleStage, coalesce(ts.status_name, ts.status_code) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('基线：', coalesce(ts.baseline_code, '-')), concat('图纸版次：', coalesce(ts.drawing_revision, '-')), concat('验证：', coalesce(ts.verification_status, '-')), concat('发布：', coalesce(ts.release_status, '-')) ) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', coalesce(ts.source_system, 'PLM'), 'sourceTable', coalesce(ts.source_table, 't1_object_technical_status'), 'sourceRecordId', ts.id, 'sourceRecordKey', ts.status_code, 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'baselineCode', ts.baseline_code, 'bomVersion', ts.bom_version, 'drawingRevision', ts.drawing_revision, 'processRevision', ts.process_revision, 'modificationStatus', ts.modification_status, 'deviationStatus', ts.deviation_status, 'verificationStatus', ts.verification_status, 'releaseStatus', ts.release_status, 'effectiveFrom', ts.effective_from ) as char) as attrsJson, ts.effective_from as eventTime, 20 as sortGroup from t1_object_technical_status ts where ts.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and ts.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'CONFIG' as sourceSystem, coalesce(sh.source_table, 't1_object_status_history') as sourceTable, sh.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(sh.source_record_id, sh.id) as sourceRecordKey, 'status_history' as itemType, 'TECHNICAL_STATUS' as lifecycleStage, concat(sh.status_category, '：', coalesce(sh.old_status, '-'), ' -> ', sh.new_status) as itemName, sh.change_reason as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'CONFIG', 'sourceTable', coalesce(sh.source_table, 't1_object_status_history'), 'sourceRecordId', sh.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(sh.source_record_id, sh.id), 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'statusCategory', sh.status_category, 'oldStatus', sh.old_status, 'newStatus', sh.new_status, 'changedBy', sh.changed_by, 'changeTime', sh.change_time ) as char) as attrsJson, sh.change_time as eventTime, 30 as sortGroup from t1_object_status_history sh where sh.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and sh.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'ICD' as sourceSystem, 't1_object_interface' as sourceTable, oi.id as sourceRecordId, oi.interface_code as sourceRecordKey, 'interface' as itemType, 'INTERFACE' as lifecycleStage, oi.interface_name as itemName, concat_ws('，', oi.interface_summary, oi.requirement_summary) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'ICD', 'sourceTable', 't1_object_interface', 'sourceRecordId', oi.id, 'sourceRecordKey', oi.interface_code, 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'interfaceType', oi.interface_type, 'sourceBomNodeId', oi.source_bom_node_id, 'targetBomNodeId', oi.target_bom_node_id, 'maturityStatus', oi.maturity_status, 'verificationStatus', oi.verification_status ) as char) as attrsJson, oi.updated_at as eventTime, 40 as sortGroup from t1_object_interface oi where oi.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and (oi.source_bom_node_id = #{nodeId} or oi.target_bom_node_id = #{nodeId}) union all select 'MRO' as sourceSystem, 't1_life_usage_record' as sourceTable, lu.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(lu.usage_source_id, lu.id) as sourceRecordKey, 'life_usage' as itemType, 'SERVICE' as lifecycleStage, concat('使用履历：', lu.usage_source_type) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('FH+', lu.fh_delta), concat('FC+', lu.fc_delta), concat('累计FH ', coalesce(lu.total_fh_after, 0)), concat('累计FC ', coalesce(lu.total_fc_after, 0)), concat('剩余寿命 ', coalesce(lu.remaining_life_value, '-'), coalesce(lu.remaining_life_unit, '')) ) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'MRO', 'sourceTable', 't1_life_usage_record', 'sourceRecordId', lu.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(lu.usage_source_id, lu.id), 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'usageSourceType', lu.usage_source_type, 'fhDelta', lu.fh_delta, 'fcDelta', lu.fc_delta, 'landingDelta', lu.landing_delta, 'totalFhAfter', lu.total_fh_after, 'totalFcAfter', lu.total_fc_after, 'remainingLifeValue', lu.remaining_life_value, 'remainingLifeUnit', lu.remaining_life_unit, 'calculatedBy', lu.calculated_by ) as char) as attrsJson, lu.event_time as eventTime, 50 as sortGroup from t1_life_usage_record lu where lu.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and lu.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'MRO' as sourceSystem, 't1_work_order' as sourceTable, wo.id as sourceRecordId, wo.wo_number as sourceRecordKey, 't1_work_order' as itemType, 'SERVICE' as lifecycleStage, concat('维修工单：', wo.wo_number) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('类型：', wo.wo_type), concat('状态：', wo.wo_status), concat('站点：', coalesce(wo.station, '-')), coalesce(wo.remark, '') ) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'MRO', 'sourceTable', 't1_work_order', 'sourceRecordId', wo.id, 'sourceRecordKey', wo.wo_number, 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'woType', wo.wo_type, 'woStatus', wo.wo_status, 'openDate', wo.open_date, 'closeDate', wo.close_date, 'station', wo.station, 'mroOrg', wo.mro_org, 'crsNumber', wo.crs_number ) as char) as attrsJson, coalesce(wo.close_date, wo.open_date) as eventTime, 60 as sortGroup from t1_work_order wo where wo.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and wo.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'MRO' as sourceSystem, 't1_fault_event' as sourceTable, fe.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(fe.node_id, fe.instance_id, fe.id) as sourceRecordKey, 't1_fault_event' as itemType, 'FAULT' as lifecycleStage, concat('故障事件：', coalesce(fe.severity, '-')) as itemName, fe.fault_description as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'MRO', 'sourceTable', 't1_fault_event', 'sourceRecordId', fe.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(fe.node_id, fe.instance_id, fe.id), 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'reportedAt', fe.reported_at, 'severity', fe.severity, 'faultSource', fe.fault_source, 'status', fe.status, 'resolutionType', fe.resolution_type, 'deferralRef', fe.deferral_ref ) as char) as attrsJson, fe.reported_at as eventTime, 70 as sortGroup from t1_fault_event fe where fe.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and fe.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'MES' as sourceSystem, 't1_inspection_record' as sourceTable, ir.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(ir.inspection_std_doc, ir.id) as sourceRecordKey, 't1_inspection_record' as itemType, 'INSPECTION' as lifecycleStage, concat('检验记录：', ir.inspection_type) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('标准：', coalesce(ir.inspection_std_doc, '-')), concat('结果：', ir.result), coalesce(ir.remarks, '') ) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'MES', 'sourceTable', 't1_inspection_record', 'sourceRecordId', ir.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(ir.inspection_std_doc, ir.id), 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'inspectionType', ir.inspection_type, 'inspectionStdDoc', ir.inspection_std_doc, 'measurementValues', ir.measurement_values, 'result', ir.result, 'inspectorId', ir.inspector_id, 'inspectionDate', ir.inspection_date, 'concessionNumber', ir.concession_number ) as char) as attrsJson, ir.inspection_date as eventTime, 80 as sortGroup from t1_inspection_record ir where ir.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and ir.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select 'MES' as sourceSystem, 't1_inspection_measurement' as sourceTable, im.id as sourceRecordId, im.indicator_code as sourceRecordKey, 't1_inspection_measurement' as itemType, 'INSPECTION' as lifecycleStage, coalesce(im.indicator_name, im.indicator_code) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('实测：', coalesce(im.measured_value, '-'), coalesce(im.unit, '')), concat('上限：', coalesce(im.upper_limit, '-')), concat('下限：', coalesce(im.lower_limit, '-')), concat('结论：', coalesce(im.result_flag, '-')), coalesce(im.remark, '') ) as contentSummary, null as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', 'MES', 'sourceTable', 't1_inspection_measurement', 'sourceRecordId', im.id, 'sourceRecordKey', im.indicator_code, 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'inspectionRecordId', im.inspection_record_id, 'indicatorCode', im.indicator_code, 'indicatorName', im.indicator_name, 'nominalValue', im.nominal_value, 'upperLimit', im.upper_limit, 'lowerLimit', im.lower_limit, 'measuredValue', im.measured_value, 'unit', im.unit, 'resultFlag', im.result_flag, 'defectCode', im.defect_code, 'defectLevel', im.defect_level ) as char) as attrsJson, null as eventTime, 90 as sortGroup from t1_inspection_measurement im where im.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and im.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} union all select coalesce(fr.source_system, fa.source_system, 'DOC') as sourceSystem, 't1_file_relation' as sourceTable, fr.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(fa.business_no, fr.source_record_key, fr.id) as sourceRecordKey, 't1_file_relation' as itemType, 'DOCUMENT' as lifecycleStage, coalesce(fa.business_title, fa.business_no, fa.display_name) as itemName, concat_ws('，', concat('类型：', coalesce(fa.business_type, '-')), concat('版次：', coalesce(fa.revision, '-')), concat('生效：', coalesce(fa.effective_date, '-')) ) as contentSummary, coalesce(fa.storage_key, fa.storage_path, fa.access_url) as fileStorageKey, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', coalesce(fr.source_system, fa.source_system, 'DOC'), 'sourceTable', 't1_file_relation', 'sourceRecordId', fr.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(fa.business_no, fr.source_record_key, fr.id), 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_object( 'partNumber', fr.part_number, 'relationSourceTable', fr.source_table, 'assetSourceTable', fa.source_table, 'businessType', fa.business_type, 'businessNo', fa.business_no, 'revision', fa.revision, 'effectiveDate', fa.effective_date, 'isCurrent', fr.is_current ) as char) as attrsJson, fr.created_at as eventTime, 100 as sortGroup from t1_file_relation fr inner join t1_file_asset fa on fa.id = fr.file_id where fr.part_number = #{partNumber} and fr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and fr.relation_status != 'deleted' and fr.relation_type in ('PART_DOCUMENT','TECHNICAL_FILE','DRAWING','MODEL','ATTACHMENT','DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT') and ( fr.dossier_version_id is null or ( fr.source_record_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t1_file_relation source_fr where source_fr.id = fr.source_record_id ) ) ) ) x order by sortGroup, eventTime desc, sourceRecordKey

select fr.id as sourceRelationId, fr.file_id as fileAssetId, fr.category_id as categoryId, coalesce(fa.business_no, fr.target_code, fr.source_record_key, fr.id) as docNo, coalesce(fa.business_title, fa.display_name, fr.target_name, fr.target_code) as title, coalesce(fa.storage_key, fa.storage_path, fa.access_url) as fileStorageKey, coalesce(fr.source_system, fa.source_system, 'DOC') as sourceSystem, 't1_file_relation' as sourceTable, fr.id as sourceRecordId, coalesce(fr.source_record_key, fa.source_record_key, fr.id) as sourceRecordKey, fr.required_flag as requiredFlag, fr.included_flag as includedFlag, fr.completeness_status as completenessStatus, fr.relation_status as documentStatus, fr.relation_type as sourceRelationType, fr.target_type as sourceTargetType, fr.target_id as sourceTargetId, fr.target_code as sourceTargetCode, fr.part_number as sourcePartNumber, fr.part_instance_id as sourcePartInstanceId, fr.bom_node_id as sourceBomNodeId, cast(json_object( 'sourceSystem', coalesce(fr.source_system, fa.source_system, 'DOC'), 'sourceTable', 't1_file_relation', 'sourceRecordId', fr.id, 'sourceRecordKey', coalesce(fr.source_record_key, fa.source_record_key, fr.id), 'assetId', fr.file_id, 'snapshotAt', date_format(sysdate(6), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(json_merge_patch( coalesce(fr.business_meta_json, json_object()), json_object( 'sourceRelationId', fr.id, 'sourceRelationType', fr.relation_type, 'sourceTargetType', fr.target_type, 'sourceTargetId', fr.target_id, 'sourceTargetCode', fr.target_code, 'sourcePartNumber', fr.part_number, 'businessType', fa.business_type, 'businessNo', fa.business_no, 'revision', fa.revision, 'effectiveDate', fa.effective_date ) ) as char) as attrsJson, fr.sort_order as sortOrder from t1_file_relation fr inner join t1_file_asset fa on fa.id = fr.file_id where fr.relation_status != 'deleted' and fr.included_flag = 1 and ( fr.dossier_version_id is null or ( fr.source_record_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t1_file_relation source_fr where source_fr.id = fr.source_record_id ) ) ) and ( fr.relation_type in ('PART_DOCUMENT','TECHNICAL_FILE','DRAWING','MODEL','ATTACHMENT','CERTIFICATE','SOURCE','DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT') or fa.asset_kind in ('DOCUMENT','MODEL','CERTIFICATE','IMAGE','DATASET','ARCHIVE') ) and ( (#{nodeId} is not null and #{nodeId} != '' and (fr.bom_node_id = #{nodeId} or (fr.target_type = 'BOM_NODE' and fr.target_id = #{nodeId}))) or (#{partInstanceId} is not null and #{partInstanceId} != '' and (fr.part_instance_id = #{partInstanceId} or (fr.target_type = 'PART_INSTANCE' and fr.target_id = #{partInstanceId}))) or (#{partNumber} is not null and #{partNumber} != '' and (fr.part_number = #{partNumber} or (fr.target_type = 'PART_MASTER' and fr.target_id = #{partNumber}) or fr.target_code = #{partNumber})) or (#{aircraftId} is not null and #{aircraftId} != '' and fr.target_type = 'AIRCRAFT' and (fr.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} or fr.target_id = #{aircraftId})) ) order by fr.required_flag desc, fr.sort_order, title limit 200

select id as instanceId, instance_code as instanceCode, instance_name as instanceName, current_version_id as currentVersionId, current_version_no as currentVersionNo, instance_label as instanceLabel, status from t1_dossier_instance where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and template_id = #{templateId} and deleted_at is null order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t1_dossier_instance (id, instance_code, instance_name, template_id, aircraft_id, current_version_no, instance_label, status, instance_options_json, created_by, updated_by) values (#{instanceId}, #{instanceCode}, #{instanceName}, #{templateId}, #{aircraftId}, 0, #{instanceLabel}, 'building', #{instanceOptionsJson}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: update t1_dossier_instance set instance_code = coalesce(nullif(instance_code, ''), #{instanceCode}), instance_name = coalesce(nullif(instance_name, ''), #{instanceName}), instance_label = coalesce(nullif(instance_label, ''), #{instanceLabel}), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{instanceId} and ( instance_code is null or instance_code = '' or instance_name is null or instance_name = '' or instance_label is null or instance_label = '' )
mapper.select: select id as versionId, version_no as versionNo, version_label as versionLabel, major_version_no as majorVersionNo, minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, template_code as templateCode, template_version as templateVersion, content_hash as contentHash from t1_dossier_version where dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} order by version_no desc limit 1

select dv.id as versionId, dv.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dv.version_no as versionNo, dv.version_label as versionLabel, dv.major_version_no as majorVersionNo, dv.minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, dv.version_level as versionLevel, dv.version_reason as versionReason, dv.template_code as templateCode, dv.template_version as templateVersion, dv.generation_job_id as generationJobId, dv.data_snapshot_id as dataSnapshotId, dv.content_hash as contentHash, dv.created_at as createdAt from t1_dossier_version dv where dv.dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} and dv.template_code = #{templateCode} and dv.template_version = #{templateVersion} and ( (dv.content_hash is not null and dv.content_hash = #{contentHash}) or ( (dv.content_hash is null or dv.content_hash = '') and (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = dv.id and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' and sn.bom_node_id is not null) = #{bomNodeCount} and not exists ( select 1 from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn left join t1_dossier_structure_node sn on sn.dossier_version_id = dv.id and sn.bom_node_id = abn.id and coalesce(sn.parent_bom_node_id, '') = coalesce(abn.parent_id, '') and coalesce(sn.bom_node_code, '') = coalesce(abn.part_number, '') and coalesce(sn.name, '') = coalesce(abn.part_name, '') and coalesce(sn.part_instance_id, '') = coalesce(abn.part_instance_id, '') and coalesce(nullif(json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')), 'null'), '') = coalesce(abn.serial_number, '') and coalesce(nullif(json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')), 'null'), '') = coalesce(abn.position_code, '') and coalesce(nullif(json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')), 'null'), '') = coalesce(abn.ata_chapter, '') where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1 and sn.id is null ) and not exists ( select 1 from t1_dossier_structure_node sn left join t1_aircraft_bom_node abn on abn.id = sn.bom_node_id and abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1 where sn.dossier_version_id = dv.id and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' and sn.bom_node_id is not null and abn.id is null ) ) ) order by dv.is_current desc, dv.version_no desc limit 1

select dv.id as versionId, dv.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dv.version_no as versionNo, dv.version_label as versionLabel, dv.major_version_no as majorVersionNo, dv.minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, dv.version_level as versionLevel, dv.version_reason as versionReason, dv.template_code as templateCode, dv.template_version as templateVersion, dv.generation_job_id as generationJobId, dv.data_snapshot_id as dataSnapshotId, dv.content_hash as contentHash, dv.created_at as createdAt from t1_generation_job gj inner join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = gj.dossier_version_id where gj.dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} and gj.precheck_run_id = #{precheckRunId} and gj.job_status = 'succeeded' and dv.deleted_at is null order by dv.version_no desc limit 1
mapper.update: update t1_dossier_version set is_current = 0 where dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} and is_current = 1
mapper.insert: insert into t1_dossier_version (id, dossier_instance_id, template_id, template_code, template_version, template_snapshot_json, version_no, version_label, major_version_no, minor_version_no, version_level, previous_version_id, generation_job_id, data_snapshot_id, version_reason, is_current, change_summary, content_hash, content_summary_json, generation_params_json, created_by) values (#{versionId}, #{instanceId}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateVersion}, #{templateSnapshotJson}, #{versionNo}, #{versionLabel}, #{majorVersionNo}, #{minorVersionNo}, #{versionLevel}, #{previousVersionId}, #{generationJobId}, #{dataSnapshotId}, #{versionReason}, 1, #{changeSummary}, #{contentHash}, #{contentSummaryJson}, #{generationParamsJson}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: update t1_dossier_instance set current_version_id = #{versionId}, current_version_no = #{versionNo}, status = 'ready', updated_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{instanceId}
mapper.insert: insert into t1_data_inspection_run (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, check_scope_type, run_code, trigger_type, run_status, scope_description, rule_set_version, checked_object_count, issue_count, initiated_by, summary_json, finished_at) values (#{runId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, 'dossier', #{runCode}, 'manual', case when #{runStatus} = 'blocked' then 'failed' else #{runStatus} end, #{scopeDescription}, #{ruleSetVersion}, #{checkedObjectCount}, #{issueCount}, #{initiatedBy}, #{summaryJson}, sysdate(6))

insert into t1_data_snapshot (id, dossier_instance_id, snapshot_code, snapshot_type, subject_type, subject_id, snapshot_data_json, created_by) values (#{snapshotId}, #{instanceId}, #{snapshotCode}, 'checkpoint', 'dossier', #{instanceId}, #{snapshotDataJson}, #{createdBy})

insert into t1_generation_job (id, job_code, job_type, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, precheck_run_id, job_status, current_stage, progress_percent, pull_strategy_json, generator_params_json, source_system, requested_by, started_at, result_summary_json, output_json) values (#{jobId}, #{jobCode}, 'generate', #{instanceId}, null, #{precheckRunId}, 'running', 'precheck_passed', 35.00, #{pullStrategyJson}, #{generatorParamsJson}, 'DOSSIER', #{requestedBy}, sysdate(6), json_object(), json_object())
mapper.update: update t1_generation_job set dossier_version_id = #{versionId}, current_stage = 'version_created', progress_percent = 70.00 where id = #{jobId}

update t1_generation_job set job_status = 'succeeded', current_stage = 'finished', progress_percent = 100.00, result_summary_json = #{resultSummaryJson}, output_json = #{outputJson}, finished_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: insert into t1_dossier_structure_node (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, aircraft_id, bom_node_id, parent_bom_node_id, bom_node_code, object_level, part_instance_id, parent_id, node_kind, code, name, node_path, sort_order, chapter_status, completeness_status, content_count, missing_count, required_flag, attrs_json, source_trace_json) values (#{structureNodeId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, #{aircraftId}, #{bomNodeId}, #{parentBomNodeId}, #{bomNodeCode}, #{objectLevel}, #{partInstanceId}, #{parentId}, #{nodeKind}, #{code}, #{name}, #{nodePath}, #{sortOrder}, #{chapterStatus}, #{completenessStatus}, #{contentCount}, #{missingCount}, #{requiredFlag}, #{attrsJson}, #{sourceTraceJson})

insert into t1_dossier_content_item (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, structure_node_id, item_code, item_name, item_type, lifecycle_stage, aircraft_id, bom_node_id, part_instance_id, is_key_part, supply_mode, source_system, source_table, source_record_id, source_record_key, include_design_data, include_manufacturing_data, include_service_data, include_source_proof, required_flag, included_flag, completeness_status, item_status, sort_order, content_summary, file_storage_key, source_trace_json, attrs_json) values (#{contentItemId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, #{structureNodeId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{itemType}, #{lifecycleStage}, #{aircraftId}, #{bomNodeId}, #{partInstanceId}, #{isKeyPart}, #{supplyMode}, #{sourceSystem}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{sourceRecordKey}, #{includeDesignData}, #{includeManufacturingData}, #{includeServiceData}, #{includeSourceProof}, #{requiredFlag}, #{includedFlag}, #{completenessStatus}, #{itemStatus}, #{sortOrder}, #{contentSummary}, #{fileStorageKey}, #{sourceTraceJson}, #{attrsJson})

insert into t1_file_asset (id, file_code, asset_kind, business_no, business_type, business_title, file_status, display_name, storage_key, source_system, source_table, source_record_id, source_record_key, metadata_json, uploaded_by, created_by, updated_by) values (#{fileAssetId}, concat('DOSSIER-FILE-', #{fileAssetId}), 'DOCUMENT', #{docNo}, 'DOSSIER_DOCUMENT', #{title}, #{documentStatus}, #{title}, #{fileStorageKey}, #{sourceSystem}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{sourceRecordKey}, #{attrsJson}, 'system', 'system', 'system')

insert ignore into t1_file_relation (id, file_id, category_id, relation_type, target_type, target_id, target_code, target_name, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, structure_node_id, aircraft_id, bom_node_id, part_number, part_instance_id, object_level, lifecycle_stage, business_domain, required_flag, included_flag, completeness_status, relation_status, sort_order, source_system, source_table, source_record_id, source_record_key, source_trace_json, business_meta_json) values (#{documentEntryId}, #{fileAssetId}, #{categoryId}, 'DOSSIER_ATTACHMENT', 'DOSSIER_NODE', #{structureNodeId}, #{docNo}, #{title}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, #{structureNodeId}, #{aircraftId}, #{bomNodeId}, #{partNumber}, #{partInstanceId}, #{objectLevel}, #{lifecycleStage}, #{businessDomain}, #{requiredFlag}, #{includedFlag}, #{completenessStatus}, #{documentStatus}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceSystem}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{sourceRecordKey}, #{sourceTraceJson}, #{attrsJson})

insert into t1_dossier_operation_log (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, operation_type, operation_name, operation_status, business_subject_type, business_subject_id, operator_id, operator_name, source_ip, detail_json, result_message) values (#{operationLogId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, #{operationType}, #{operationName}, #{operationStatus}, #{businessSubjectType}, #{businessSubjectId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{sourceIp}, #{detailJson}, #{resultMessage})
mapper.select: select count(1) from t1_file_relation where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and included_flag = 1 and relation_status != 'deleted'

select id as jobId, job_code as jobCode, job_type as jobType, dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dossier_version_id as versionId, precheck_run_id as precheckRunId, job_status as jobStatus, current_stage as currentStage, progress_percent as progressPercent, cast(result_summary_json as char) as resultSummaryJson, started_at as startedAt, finished_at as finishedAt, created_at as createdAt from t1_generation_job where id = #{jobId}

select gj.id as jobId, gj.job_code as jobCode, gj.job_status as jobStatus, gj.progress_percent as progressPercent, gj.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, gj.dossier_version_id as versionId, dv.version_label as versionLabel, dv.version_level as versionLevel, dv.major_version_no as majorVersionNo, dv.minor_version_no as minorVersionNo, di.instance_label as instanceLabel, cast(gj.result_summary_json as char) as resultSummaryJson, cast(gj.output_json as char) as outputJson from t1_generation_job gj left join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = gj.dossier_version_id left join t1_dossier_instance di on di.id = gj.dossier_instance_id where gj.id = #{jobId}
